description: Combine numbered tiles to reach the legendary 2048 tile. A deceptively simple puzzle game that will have you hooked for hours. Swipe or use arrow keys to slide all tiles in one direction.
controls: Use Arrow Keys or WASD to slide tiles. Combine matching numbers to reach 2048!

title: Slope
description: Control a ball rolling down a steep slope in a 3D environment. Dodge obstacles, avoid falling off the edge, and see how far you can go. Speed increases as you progress!
controls: Use A/D or Left/Right arrow keys to steer the ball. Don't fall off!

title: Stickman Hook
description: Swing through levels as a stickman using a grappling hook. Master the physics of momentum and timing to complete each level with style and speed.
controls: Click or tap to shoot hook. Release to let go. Chain swings for max speed!

title: Moto X3M
description: Race through insane obstacle courses on your motorcycle. Perform death-defying stunts, tackle explosive traps, and beat the clock to earn 3 stars on every level!
controls: Arrow keys to accelerate/brake and tilt. Complete levels as fast as possible for 3 stars!

title: Shell Shockers
description: A multiplayer FPS where you play as an egg armed to the teeth. Battle other eggs across unique maps in fast-paced egg-combat. Crack your enemies before they crack you!
controls: WASD to move, mouse to aim, left click to shoot. E to swap weapons, space to jump.

title: Basketball Legends
description: Play as NBA legends in this fast-paced basketball game. Challenge the AI or a friend in 1v1 matches. Activate special power-ups and slam dunk your way to victory!
controls: Player 1: WASD + G/H/J. Player 2: Arrow Keys + 1/2/3. Score to win!

title: Run 3
description: Run through a tunnel in outer space! Jump over gaps, rotate the tunnel to find your path, and collect power cells. How deep into space can you run?
controls: Arrow keys or WASD to move and jump. A/D or Left/Right to rotate tunnel sections.

title: Tetris
description: The legendary block-stacking puzzle game that started it all. Clear lines by filling complete rows. The pace gets faster as you level up. How long can you last?
controls: Left/Right arrows to move. Up arrow to rotate. Down arrow to soft drop. Space for hard drop.

title: Subway Surfers
description: Run through the subway system dodging trains and collecting coins. Use hoverboards, jetpacks, and power-ups to escape the inspector. The most played mobile game, now in your browser!
controls: Arrow keys to move left/right, jump, and roll. Swipe on mobile devices.

title: Krunker.io
description: A fast-paced browser-based FPS with a blocky art style. Multiple classes, maps, and game modes. Rise through the ranks and customize your character with unique skins.
controls: WASD to move, mouse to aim and shoot. Scroll to switch weapons. Shift to crouch.

title: Dino Chrome
description: The classic Chrome offline dinosaur game, now playable anytime! Jump over cacti and duck under pterodactyls. The speed increases over time - how far can you run?
controls: Space or Up Arrow to jump. Down Arrow to duck. Don't hit the obstacles!

title: Fireboy & Watergirl
description: Guide Fireboy and Watergirl through the Forest Temple. Fireboy can walk through fire, Watergirl through water, but never through the opposite! Solve puzzles and collect gems.
controls: Fireboy: Arrow Keys. Watergirl: WASD. Work together to reach the exits!

title: Happy Wheels
description: A ragdoll physics game where characters meet hilarious and gruesome fates. Choose a character and vehicle, then navigate obstacle courses in the most chaotic way possible.
controls: Arrow keys to control vehicle. Space for special action. Ctrl to eject!

title: Tank Trouble
description: Battle tanks in a maze arena! Bullets bounce off walls, so plan your shots carefully. Play solo against AI or challenge friends in multiplayer chaos!
controls: Player 1: ESDF + Q to shoot. Player 2: Arrow keys + M. Ricochet shots to win!

title: Agar.io
description: Start as a tiny cell and eat smaller cells to grow. Split and eject mass to hunt or escape. Dominate the leaderboard by becoming the biggest cell on the server!
controls: Mouse to move. Space to split. W to eject mass. Get bigger by eating smaller cells!

title: Snake.io
description: The classic Snake game evolved into a multiplayer battleground. Grow your snake by eating glowing orbs. Trap other snakes to defeat them and absorb their remains!
controls: Mouse to steer. Click or Space to boost speed. Don't crash into others or yourself!

title: Drift Hunters
description: The ultimate drifting game with realistic car physics. Tune your car, master the tracks, and rack up drift points. Unlock new cars and upgrades as you progress.
controls: WASD to drive, Space for handbrake. Earn points by drifting through corners!

title: Minecraft Classic
description: The original Minecraft experience, playable in your browser! Build anything you can imagine with 32 block types. A pure creative sandbox experience, celebrating Minecraft's 10th anniversary.
controls: WASD to move, Space to jump, Left click to place, Right click to remove blocks.

title: Cut the Rope
description: Feed candy to the hungry little monster Om Nom! Cut ropes, collect stars, and use physics-based tools to deliver sweets. Over 425 levels of brain-teasing fun!
controls: Click and drag to cut ropes. Interact with items in the level. Feed Om Nom the candy!

title: Flappy Bird
description: Navigate your bird through gaps between pipes without hitting them! Simple one-button gameplay that is infuriatingly difficult. The original casual mobile game legend.
controls: Click, tap, or press Space to flap. Don't touch the pipes or the ground!

title: Geometry Dash
description: Jump and fly through dangerous passages in this rhythm-based action platformer. Each level syncs perfectly with its music track. One tap controls, but perfecting each level takes serious skill!
controls: Click, tap, or press Space to jump. Hold for longer jumps. Time with the music!

title: Age of War
description: Evolve your civilization through the ages while defending your base and destroying the enemy's. Train units, build turrets, and unlock special attacks as you advance through history!
controls: Click to spawn units and activate special attacks. Balance offense and defense to win!

title: Five Nights at Freddy's
description: Survive 5 nights as a security guard at Freddy Fazbear's Pizza. Monitor cameras, manage power, and keep the animatronics from reaching your office. Can you make it to 6 AM?
controls: Mouse to manage cameras and doors. Right and Left buttons to close doors. Watch your power!

title: Rocket League Sideswipe
description: Soccer meets rocket-powered cars in this insane sports game! Hit the ball into the goal with your car, use boost to fly through the air, and score spectacular aerial goals!
controls: Arrow keys to drive and fly. Space for boost. Hit the ball into the opponent's goal!

title: Among Us Online
description: Work together to maintain your spaceship—or secretly sabotage it as an Impostor. Complete tasks, hold emergency meetings, and vote off who you think is the impostor!
controls: WASD to move. E to interact. R to use ability. Space to report bodies. Use chat to discuss!
